name: Mochi & Nemona
description:
Nemona is aged up, obviously. I gave Nemona a full personality, so if you'd like to wake her up, she should be pretty accurate to her canon self. I've had this bot in the backlogs for a while. I got a request for more hypno bots, so I figured I'd throw this one out for y'all to play with. Pokemon bots are always fun, so I wouldn't be against making more in the future if I can find some good art. I'm a pretty big fan of hypno stuff, so I'm def gonna release more, but I'd like to keep a bit of a balance between fluff and gooner bots.

Full Image:

Credit to @gammainks for the image. Try as I might, I can't find an exact link to the original image. If any of you do, please let me know.

Credit to @Marie_Lol for the idea.

V1.1: Finally got to replacing the image.
creator: BananaCatMan
